programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Man With the Golden Gun
programme.desc: Cool government operative James Bond (Roger Moore) searches for a stolen invention that can turn the sun's heat into a destructive weapon. He soon crosses paths with the menacing Francisco Scaramanga (Christopher Lee), a hit man so skilled he has a seven-figure working fee. Bond then joins forces with the swimsuit-clad Mary Goodnight (Britt Ekland), and together they track Scaramanga to a tropical isle hideout where the killer-for-hire lures the slick spy into a deadly maze for a final duel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash's experience as a doctor in Syria informs his unconventional approach as he joins the staff at York Memorial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey is suspicious of the illegal duplication of Dog River money; Hank gets a case of pink eye, causing Brent and Wanda to panic in Corner Gas; Karen is frustrated with Davis.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma goes Christmas shopping early making everyone curious to find out what they are getting.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charming real-estate broker accused of murder defends himself and manages to get key evidence thrown out of the trial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.desc: Hannah throws a sexy holiday party for all the Islanders; Gracyn confronts Austin about the state of their relationship; Clarke explores opportunities in LA and seeks Taylor's support; Pepe tries to make amends with TJ and Iris.

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.desc: Taylor shows the boys his ranch and the nightlife in Oklahoma; Chris contemplates his relationship with Coco; Clarke gains insight about modeling and her future living situation; Iris has a surprise for TJ; Amaya recovers from surgery.

programme.title: The Best You Can
programme.desc: Cynthia Rand is a New York City urologist whose world gets turned upside down when her husband starts to show signs of dementia. Stan Olszewski is an underachieving security guard who drifts through life without much direction. Their worlds soon collide when a chance encounter leads to a growing friendship built on late-night texts, candid confessions and irreverent humor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Subjects of Desire
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural shift in North American beauty standards toward embracing Black female aesthetics and features while exposing the deliberate and often dangerous portrayals of Black women in the media.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: One Bad Apple: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law and order as she investigates a murder.

programme.title: Rock N' Roll Christmas
programme.desc: An estranged mother/daughter country music duo reunite after 10 years apart to release a Christmas single after a video of them goes viral.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Solemates
programme.desc: A love triangle between a shoe store owner, a customer and an old pair of shoes. When Andrew walks into William's store to replace his own worn old pair of brogues, interest is piqued.

programme.title: All I Want for Christmas
programme.desc: A young girl's Christmas wish for her divorced parents to get back together becomes a reality with a twist of holiday joy, comedy, and laughter.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: As Bash's future at the hospital hangs in the balance, he diagnoses a young patient with a rare disease that could have been prevented; Mags is faced with a case she cannot solve, as June tries to keep her personal life private.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen and Davis figure out a way to get Emma to do free cleaning.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar and Emma discover an easy way to make some fast money; Davis decides to take off with Brent's car.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Several animal rights activists are under suspicion when an AIDS researcher performing tests on primates is murdered in the lab.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Monica
programme.desc: A woman returns home to care for her ailing mother, whom she hasn't seen in years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Road
programme.desc: On a frozen remote highway in the Canadian North, an Indigenous woman and her dog are hunted by a stranger in a semi truck.

programme.title: Hey, Viktor!
programme.desc: Twenty-five long years after his time in the limelight, former child actor Cody Lightning tries to revive his fame with a self-produced sequel to "Smoke Signals.".

programme.title: Drive Back Home
programme.desc: In the winter of 1970, a cantankerous, small town plumber from rural New Brunswick, must drive his beat-up work truck 1000 miles to Toronto to get his estranged, gay brother out of jail after being arrested for having sex in a public park. The two men are then forced to drive back home together at the behest of their hard-nosed mother before they kill each other.

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into early retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: After settling in Green Hills, Sonic is eager to prove that he has what it takes to be a true hero. His test comes when Dr. Robotnik returns with a new partner, Knuckles, in search of a mystical emerald that has the power to destroy civilizations. Sonic teams up with his own sidekick, Tails, and together they embark on a globe-trotting journey to find the emerald before it falls into the wrong hands.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When someone murders Capt. Frederick Burns, Aurora Teagarden must solve the case, despite never seeing eye to eye with the man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.
